reviews.comment:
LO bueno de esta estación de servicio es que está la lado de la ruta pero debajo de un puente y eso hace que no esté tan llena como las demás estaciones de servicio durante la temporada de verano.

(Translated by Google)
The good thing about this gas station is that it's on the side of the road but under a bridge, which means it's not as crowded as other gas stations during the summer season.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
No te hacen el descuento con la app YPF. Llené el tanque lunes 6 defebrero al mediodia, la app abria y leia el código pero nunca llegaba a mostrarme el botón para pagar. Traté 5 veces, esperando mucho cada vez. No funcionó, pagué con tarjeta de crédito y no me hicieron el descuento por ser serviclub. Cuando me quejé con un jefe de estación de nombre Juan Pablo, me dijo que el problema era mio, de mi app o teléfono, y que solo podía ayudarme si me quedaba a anular la compra y seguir intentando pagar con la app. Entre seguir perdiendo tiempo y perder plata decidí lo segundo. Venia pagando sin problema con la app en CABA y Patagonia.

(Translated by Google)
They don't give you the discount with the YPF app. I filled up my tank on Monday, February 6th at noon. The app opened and read the code, but it never showed me the payment button. I tried five times, waiting a long time each time. It didn't work; I paid by credit card, and they wouldn't give me the discount for being a Serviclub member. When I complained to a station manager named Juan Pablo, he told me the problem was with me, my app, or my phone, and that he could only help me if I stayed to cancel the purchase and then continue trying to pay with the app. Between wasting time and money, I decided to do the latter. I had been paying without problems with the app in Buenos Aires City and Patagonia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoN1A2aGRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo a la costa paro en ésta estación de servicio por unos sencillos motivos: los baños son grandes y están bien cuidados pero además tiene en el fondo un sector para estacionar cómodo.
La atención de los playeros es bastante buena también.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel to the coast, I stop at this gas station for a few simple reasons: the restrooms are large and well-maintained, and it also has a convenient parking area at the back.
The service from the beach attendants is also quite good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodExIOUJREAE
